meta.description: Sanitized export of Finance Automation Staging Pipeline. Replace placeholder folder and sheet IDs before activation.

parameters.queryString: ={{ "'" + $json.inboxFolderId + "' in parents and mimeType != 'application/vnd.google-apps.folder' and trashed = false" }}

options.systemMessage: You are a conservative finance document extractor. Input is JSON containing: file_name, mime_type, payload_truncated, extracted_text, extracted_text_chars. Use extracted_text only. Return strict JSON only with this exact key set and casing: document_type, vendor, date_document, total_amount, currency, confidence_score, notes, event_summary, unreadable. Allowed values: document_type in Invoice|Receipt|Bank Statement|Other; date_document in YYYY-MM-DD; currency in USD|null; confidence_score in 0..1; unreadable boolean. All keys are required in every response. event_summary must be a concise summary of document events from extracted text only (1-3 short sentences, business facts only). If extraction is uncertain, keep unreadable=false but still fill best-effort values and explain uncertainty in notes. Set unreadable=true only when text is unusable, and then set confidence_score=0 with notes explaining why. No markdown.

parameters.content:
Pipeline sequence (state-based):
1) Trigger on 00_INBOX polling.
2) Move file to 10_PROCESSING immediately.
3) Run conservative OCR/classification extraction.
4) Decide route: 20_PROCESSED, 30_REVIEW, or 99_ERROR.
5) Rename file using YYYY-MM-DD_Vendor_DocumentType.ext.
6) Append one row to Financial Log.
7) Move renamed file to terminal folder.

Atomic intent: items should only end in 20_PROCESSED when rename + log + move succeed.
